items.title: Reported Earlier, Honeywell Aerospace Prices $16B Multi-Tranche Senior Notes Offering Across Nine Maturities From 2028 To 2066 In Connection With Planned Spin-Off
Deutsche Bank Sees Higher Value in Honeywell (HON), Raises Price Target
items.description: Honeywell International Inc. (NASDAQ:HON) is included among the 14 Best American Dividend Stocks to Invest in. On March 4, Deutsche Bank raised its price recommendation on Honeywell International Inc. (NASDAQ:HON) to $292 from $273. It reiterated a Buy rating on the stock. The firm said the change reflects an updated sum-of-the-parts valuation for the company. […]

items.title: HONEYWELL ANNOUNCES PRICING OF HONEYWELL AEROSPACE'S OFFERING OF SENIOR NOTES IN CONNECTION WITH PLANNED SPIN-OFF
items.description: Honeywell (NASDAQ: HON) today announced that, in connection with the previously announced plan to spin-off (the "Spin-Off") Honeywell Aerospace Inc. ("Aerospace") from Honeywell, Aerospace has priced a private offering of $1,250,000,000 aggregate principal amount of 3.900% senior notes due 2028 (the "2028 notes"), $1,250,000,000 aggregate principal amount of 4.000% senior notes due 2029 (the "2029 notes"), $500,000,000 aggregate principal amount of floating rate senior notes due 2029 (the "2029

items.title: Interface Systems Strengthens Alarm Monitoring Against Cellular Jamming and Break-Ins
items.author: Not Specified
items.description: Interface Systems announced the integration of JamAlert™ cellular jammer detection technology with its TamperShield™ alarm monitoring service. The combined solution detects criminal attempts to disable alarm systems using cellular interference before break-ins occur, providing early warning, continuous monitoring, video verification, and faster law enforcement response for retail, financial, and museum environments.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Honeywell is mentioned as compatible with the new solution but plays a passive role. The integration supports existing Honeywell systems without requiring replacement, which is neither particularly beneficial nor detrimental to the company.
